'''鈭歾-z-l''' ('''kazazal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrisect|quadrisect]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrisect|quadrisect]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-z-l
|-
! Lemma
| kazazal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizazal|thizazal]] || [[word:jizazal|jizazal]] || [[word:shizazal|shizazal]] || [[word:kizazal|kizazal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzazal|thuthuzazal]] || [[word:jujuzazal|jujuzazal]] || [[word:shushuzazal|shushuzazal]] || [[word:kukuzazal|kukuzazal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzazal|thuzazal]] || [[word:juzazal|juzazal]] || [[word:shuzazal|shuzazal]] || [[word:kuzazal|kuzazal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzazal|thuzazal]] || [[word:juzazal|juzazal]] || [[word:shuzazal|shuzazal]] || [[word:kuzazal|kuzazal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezazal|thezazal]] || [[word:jezazal|jezazal]] || [[word:shezazal|shezazal]] || [[word:kezazal|kezazal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozazal|thothozazal]] || [[word:jojozazal|jojozazal]] || [[word:shoshozazal|shoshozazal]] || [[word:kokozazal|kokozazal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozazal|thozazal]] || [[word:jozazal|jozazal]] || [[word:shozazal|shozazal]] || [[word:kozazal|kozazal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozazal|thozazal]] || [[word:jozazal|jozazal]] || [[word:shozazal|shozazal]] || [[word:kozazal|kozazal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zazal|th忙zazal]] || [[word:j忙zazal|j忙zazal]] || [[word:sh忙zazal|sh忙zazal]] || [[word:k忙zazal|k忙zazal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazazal|thathazazal]] || [[word:jajazazal|jajazazal]] || [[word:shashazazal|shashazazal]] || [[word:kakazazal|kakazazal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazazal|thazazal]] || [[word:jazazal|jazazal]] || [[word:shazazal|shazazal]] || [[word:kazazal|kazazal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazazal|thazazal]] || [[word:jazazal|jazazal]] || [[word:shazazal|shazazal]] || [[word:kazazal|kazazal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazazal|shazazal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazazal|goshazazal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazazal|gokishazazal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazazaln眉|shazazaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazazalnkn眉|goshazazalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazaln眉|gokishazazaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazazalsh毛|shazazalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazazalnksh毛|goshazazalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazazalsh毛|gokishazazalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazalro|shazazalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazalnkro|goshazazalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazalro|gokishazazalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazalmu|shazazalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazalnkmu|goshazazalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazalmu|gokishazazalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazazalsher|shazazalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazazalnksher|goshazazalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazazalsher|gokishazazalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazazalng|shazazalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazazalnkng|goshazazalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazazalng|gokishazazalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazazalya|shazazalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazazalnkya|goshazazalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazazalya|gokishazazalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazazalyam|shazazalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazazalnkyam|goshazazalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazazalyam|gokishazazalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazaln眉sh毛|shazazaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazalnkn眉sh毛|goshazazalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazaln眉sh毛|gokishazazaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazaln眉ro|shazazaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazalnkn眉ro|goshazazalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazaln眉ro|gokishazazaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazaln眉mu|shazazaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazalnkn眉mu|goshazazalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazaln眉mu|gokishazazaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazalsh毛n眉|shazazalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazalnksh毛n眉|goshazazalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazalsh毛n眉|gokishazazalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazalsh毛ro|shazazalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazalnksh毛ro|goshazazalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazalsh毛ro|gokishazazalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazalsh毛mu|shazazalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazalnksh毛mu|goshazazalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazalsh毛mu|gokishazazalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazalron眉|shazazalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazalnkron眉|goshazazalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazalron眉|gokishazazalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazalrosh毛|shazazalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazalnkrosh毛|goshazazalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazalrosh毛|gokishazazalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazazalromu|shazazalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazazalnkromu|goshazazalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazazalromu|gokishazazalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazazalmun眉|shazazalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazazalnkmun眉|goshazazalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazazalmun眉|gokishazazalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazazalmush毛|shazazalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazazalnkmush毛|goshazazalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazazalmush毛|gokishazazalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazazalmuro|shazazalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazazalnkmuro|goshazazalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazazalmuro|gokishazazalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
